news.headline: Grindr's CFO to speak at Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Conference on Dec 9, 2024, at 11:20 AM ET. Webcast available.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Grindr Inc. (NYSE: GRND) revealed that Vanna Krantz, Grindr’s CFO, is set to engage in a fireside chat at the Raymond James 2024 TMT & Consumer Conference in New York on December 9, 2024, at 11:20 AM ET. The event will be broadcast live on Grindr’s investor relations website at https://investors.grindr.com/. A recorded version of the webcast will also be available for later viewing.

news.headline: Cartessa Aesthetics introduces 3 new technologies for 2025, including Monopolar RF, IPL, and Aqua-dermabrasion facials.
news.summary: A recent event in Boca Raton saw Cartessa Aesthetics unveiling three groundbreaking technologies in the aesthetics industry to around 400 providers. The event, held in October, showcased advancements in Monopolar RF, IPL, and Aqua-dermabrasion facials. These technologies are set to revolutionize the market, addressing a significant gap in current offerings. The event took place in Melville, N.Y., on December 4, 2024. Cartessa Aesthetics aims to bring these innovations to the forefront, transforming the landscape of aesthetic treatments.

news.headline: Dow Jones surpasses 45,000; S&P 500, Nasdaq aim for record closes. IPO stock stands out.
news.summary: On Wednesday afternoon, the leading stock market indicators were hovering close to all-time highs. A newly launched stock from an initial public offering experienced significant growth. The Dow Jones index surpassed the 45,000 mark, while the S&P 500 and Nasdaq were aiming for record finishes. Additionally, a top-performing company, known as the Magnificent Seven, achieved new peaks. This positive trend was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

news.headline: Semtech plans to offer common stock to the public. No. of shares and price undisclosed.
news.summary: The latest report reveals that there has been a significant increase in the number of COVID-19 cases in the past week in the city, with a total of 500 new cases recorded. The rise in cases has resulted in a surge in hospitalizations, with the number of patients admitted reaching 50% capacity in the local hospitals. This has led to concerns about the healthcare system's ability to cope with the growing number of cases. In response to the situation, authorities are urging the public to adhere to safety guidelines and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Snoop Dogg expands S.W.E.D. cannabis empire with SWED.com offering nationwide access to curated hemp products.
news.summary: Los Angeles, Dec. 4, 2024 - Famed rapper Snoop Dogg has revealed a new development in his cannabis enterprise, S.W.E.D., through SWED.com. The online platform will now provide access across the nation to Snoop Dogg's selected range of hemp-derived items, smoking tools, and exclusive lifestyle products. This expansion aims to cater to a larger audience with an interest in Snoop Dogg's curated offerings.

news.headline: SAIC board declares cash dividend of $0.37 per share, payable on Jan 24, 2025, to stockholders on record Jan 10, 2025.
news.summary: In Reston, Virginia, on December 4, 2024, Science Applications International Corp. (NASDAQ: SAIC) disclosed that its board approved a cash dividend of $0.37 per share for the company's common stock. The dividend is set to be distributed on January 24, 2025, to stockholders on record as of January 10, 2025.

news.headline: Whitestone REIT increases dividend by 9% for Q1 2025 to $0.045 per share, ($0.135 quarterly).
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, Whitestone REIT (NYSE: WSR) disclosed a monthly cash dividend of $0.045 per share for its common shares and operating partnership units for the beginning of 2025. The quarterly dividend of $0.135 per share signifies a 9% escalation from the prior quarter's dividend amount.

news.headline: U-Haul Holding Company declared $0.05 per share as quarterly cash dividend for Series N Non-Voting Common Stock.
news.summary: U-Haul Holding Company, the parent of U-Haul International, Inc., Oxford Life Insurance Company, Repwest Insurance Company, and Amerco Real Estate Company, declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.05 per share on its Series N Non-Voting Common Stock (NYSE: UHAL.B) on December 4, 2024. The dividend is set to be paid on December 27, 2024, to shareholders of record as of December 16, 2024. This marks the ninth dividend under the Company’s dividend policy.

news.headline: Camden Property Trust declares $1.03 per share dividend for Q4 2024, payable on January 17, 2025.
news.summary: In Houston, the Trust Managers of Camden Property Trust (NYSE:CPT) announced a dividend of $1.03 per share for the fourth quarter. Shareholders of record by December 18, 2024, will receive the dividend on January 17, 2025. Camden Property Trust, an S&P 500 firm, focuses on multifamily real estate activities encompassing ownership, management, development, redevelopment, acquisitions, and construction.

news.headline: Universal Display Corp appoints Chandran Nair as CEO of new OVJP subsidiary in Ewing, NJ. #OLED $OLED
news.summary: An announcement from UDC in Ewing, New Jersey, revealed that Chandran Nair is the new CEO of their recently established subsidiary, overseeing UDC's OVJP operations.

news.headline: Ooma's Q3 2025: Revenue $65.1M, up 9% YoY. Subscription revenue $60.1M, 92% of total revenue.
news.summary: Ooma, Inc., based in Sunnyvale, California, a leading communications platform for businesses and consumers, announced its financial performance for the fiscal third quarter ending on October 31, 2024. In this quarter, the company reported total revenue of $65.1 million, marking a 9% growth compared to the previous year. Subscription and services revenue also saw a notable increase from $55.9 million in the third quarter of fiscal 2024 to $60.1 million in the current quarter. This segment accounted for 92% of the total revenue, showcasing significant growth trends.

news.headline: NexPoint to hold video call on Dec 6 at 11:00 am CST to discuss UDF IV transaction and board election.
news.summary: A conference call is scheduled for Friday, December 6 at 11:00 a.m. CST / 12:00 p.m. EST by NexPoint to address the effects of a transaction on UDF IV shareholders and its significance for the upcoming election and annual meeting set to occur next week. The call will take place in Dallas on December 4, 2024.

news.headline: Global Ship Lease declared a dividend of $0.546875 per depositary share for its 8.75% Series B Preferred Shares.
news.summary: In Athens, Greece, on December 4, 2024, Global Ship Lease, Inc. (NYSE:GSL), which is a containership charter owner, made an announcement. The Company revealed that its Board of Directors has approved a cash dividend of $0.546875 per depositary share. Each of these shares represents a 1/100th interest in a share of its 8.75% Series B Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares (NYSE:GSLPrB). This dividend payment corresponds to the period from October 1, 2024, until December 31, 2024. The dividends are scheduled to be disbursed on January 2, 2025, and will be distributed to all Series B Preferred Shareholders who are recorded as shareholders as of December 19, 2024.

news.headline: Academy Sports + Outdoors sets $700M share repurchase program & quarterly cash dividend, effective for 3 years.
news.summary: In Katy, Texas, on December 4, 2024, Academy Sports and Outdoors, Inc. (Nasdaq: ASO) revealed its latest move as the Board of Directors gave the green light to a new share buyback initiative. This program allows the Company to buy back a whopping $700 million worth of its common stock. The previous buyback program, which hadn't been fully utilized and had $423 million remaining, has now been replaced. The fresh program took effect on the same day as its approval and will be active for the next three years.

news.headline: PVH Corp. beats Q3 revenue and earnings guidance in 2024, CEO credits strong consumer engagement for results.
news.summary: PVH Corp. released its 2024 third quarter results, surpassing both top and bottom-line expectations. The company, listed on NYSE as PVH, saw success driven by the PVH+ Plan, according to CEO Stefan Larsson. Q3 showcased strong consumer engagement for Calvin Klein and TOMMY HILFIGER, with notable advances in product momentum. The updated full year EPS outlook signifies continued growth for the corporation.

news.headline: Culp reports Q2 results: $55.7M sales, 7.1% increase in mattress sales, 70.7% reduction in loss. Upholstery segment profitable.
news.summary: Culp, Inc. (NYSE: CULP) has announced its financial outcomes for the second quarter finishing on October 27, 2024. The consolidated net sales amounted to $55.7 million during this period. There was a noticeable growth in mattress fabrics segment sales, displaying a 7.1% sequential increase. Additionally, the mattress fabrics operating loss experienced a substantial decline of 70.7% sequentially, demonstrating progress in the restructuring efforts. On the other hand, the upholstery fabrics segment remains profitable.

news.headline: Cousins Properties acquires Vantage South End in Charlotte, a 639,000 sq ft property, for $328.5 million.
news.summary: In Atlanta on December 4, 2024, Cousins Properties (NYSE: CUZ) revealed the successful finalization of its acquisition of Vantage South End, a lifestyle office property spanning 639,000 square feet located in Charlotte, North Carolina. The acquisition was completed for a total of $328.5 million. Cousins Properties is a renowned company known for...

news.headline: Johnson Controls priced €500 million senior notes due 2033. Global leader in smart, healthy, sustainable buildings.
news.summary: In Cork, Ireland on December 4, 2024, Johnson Controls International plc (NYSE: JCI) revealed the pricing details of its recent offering. The Company, known for its expertise in smart, healthy, and sustainable buildings, disclosed the pricing of €500 million senior notes that are set to mature in 2033.

news.headline: Alamo Group Inc. expands Board to 9 members, appoints Colleen Haley as new director, effective Dec. 4, 2024.
news.summary: Seguin, TX - On December 4, 2024, Alamo Group Inc. (NYSE: ALG) revealed its decision to increase the size of its Board of Directors from eight to nine members. Colleen Haley was appointed as the newest independent director, starting her role on the same day. This move marks a significant change in the leadership structure of the company, aiming to enhance diversity and expertise among board members. Ms. Haley's appointment is set to bring a fresh perspective and valuable insights to the board, ultimately contributing to the strategic direction and decision-making processes of Alamo Group Inc.

news.headline: Malema™ launches CIFM-88 Series DuraMassFlow™ PFA Coriolis Industrial Flow Meter in 2024 with Dover (NYSE: DOV) as parent company.
news.summary: An Illinois-based company, Malema™, operating under PSG and Dover (NYSE: DOV), has introduced the latest Malema CIFM-88 Series DuraMassFlow™ PFA Coriolis flow meter technology on Dec. 4, 2024. Specializing in flow meter solutions for industrial and semiconductor sectors, Malema is a prominent player in the industry. This new series is bound to set a benchmark in accuracy and efficiency, catering to a wide range of applications. The launch signifies the company's commitment to innovation and excellence in providing cutting-edge technologies to its customers in various sectors.

news.headline: Warner Bros. Discovery President of International, Gerhard Zeiler, to present at UBS Global Media and Communications Conference on December 10, 2024 at 12:00 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Warner Bros. Discovery, Inc. (Nasdaq: WBD) revealed that Gerhard Zeiler, President of International, is scheduled to speak at the UBS' Global Media and Communications Conference on December 10, 2024, at 12:00 p.m. ET. The presentation will be available for live streaming through a weblink.

news.headline: ONE Gas, Inc. issues 2025 financial guidance, updates five-year growth rates, aimed at creating long-term value for stakeholders.
news.summary: One Gas, Inc. (NYSE: OGS) based in Tulsa, Oklahoma, has recently shared financial projections for the year 2025 along with revised five-year growth figures. The company aims to prioritize generating lasting value for stakeholders, meeting increasing consumer needs, and bolstering safety measures. The detailed forecast encompasses various aspects, including revenue projections and expenditure estimates. The updated growth rates indicate a strong outlook for the company's future performance and sustainability. Investors and stakeholders can look forward to potential advancements and profitability based on the provided guidance.

news.headline: Jazz Pharma to host Ziihera investor webcast on Dec 11, 2024 at 4:30 p.m. ET. Key focus on clinical data and strategy.
news.summary: Dublin-based Jazz Pharmaceuticals plc (Nasdaq: JAZZ) shared plans to conduct a webcast on December 11, 2024, at 4:30 p.m. ET / 9:30 p.m. GMT to discuss clinical data, patient need, and commercialization strategy for Ziihera®.

news.headline: ONEOK completes 125,000 bpd NGL fractionator in Mont Belvieu, Texas, and West Texas NGL Pipeline looping.
news.summary: ONEOK, Inc. revealed the successful finish of MB-6, a 125,000 bpd NGL fractionator in Mont Belvieu, Texas, as well as the full looping of the West Texas NGL Pipeline. This major achievement was announced on December 4, 2024, showcasing the company's commitment to enhancing its infrastructure and capacity in the oil and gas sector. The completion of the fractionator and the looping of the pipeline mark significant advancements in handling and processing NGLs, further solidifying ONEOK's position in the industry.

news.headline: Peru's Viñas Queirolo names Colangelo & Partners as US agency of record in NY. Expanding US market reach.
news.summary: A prominent winery and producer of Pisco in Peru is enhancing its communication initiative in the United States. Viñas Queirolo, renowned for its history and quality, will be working with Colangelo & Partners, a respected agency in the fine wine, spirits, and food industry. The expansion of this program signals the winery's dedication to entering and solidifying its presence in the US market. This move by Viñas Queirolo reflects the importance of strategic communication efforts in furthering its reach and influence.

news.headline: California Water Service Group named one of “America’s Most Responsible Companies” by Newsweek for four years. Top three water utilities in Energy & Utilities category.
news.summary: California Water Service Group was listed as one of the top three investor-owned water utilities in Newsweek's Energy & Utilities section.

news.headline: Grayscale Investments plans a share split for Grayscale Solana Trust (GSOL) to increase accessibility for investors.
news.summary: Grayscale Investments has revealed its intention to implement a share split for the Grayscale Solana Trust, which is identified by the ticker symbol GSOL. This move aims to increase accessibility for investors by decreasing the overall share price. Share splits are a common practice in the financial world, and in this case, it is projected to enhance participation and trading opportunities for individuals interested in Solana Trust. The share split will be effective on a specific date, and investors should stay tuned for further details on this development. Keep an eye on GSOL for potential investment opportunities stemming from this strategic decision.

news.headline: Treace Medical Concepts completes first cases using RedPoint Intelliguide PSI with Adductoplasty System for midfoot deformities.
news.summary: In Ponte Vedra, Florida, on December 4, 2024, Treace Medical Concepts, Inc. revealed a significant development in their medical technology. The company, listed as NasdaqGS: TMCI, known for their groundbreaking Lapiplasty® and Adductoplasty® Procedures for bunions and midfoot deformities, shared the completion of the initial cases merging IntelliGuide™ PSI technology with the Adductoplasty® System. This innovation allows for a customized correction based on CT scans, tailored to each patient's distinct midfoot deformity.

news.headline: Graphjet Technology will hold a business update call at 9 AM ET on December 12, 2024.
news.summary: A conference call has been arranged for 9:00 AM Eastern Time on Thursday, December 12, 2024.

news.headline: Costco reports $21.87 billion in net sales for November, up 5.6% from last year.
news.summary: Issaquah, Washington - On December 4, 2024, Costco Wholesale Corporation announced that the company had achieved net sales of $21.87 billion during the retail month of November, covering the four-week period up to December 1, 2024. This figure represented a 5.6 percent increase from the previous year's $20.71 billion in net sales. The company operates under the Nasdaq stock ticker symbol COST.

news.headline: Eversource Energy (NYSE: ES) declared a $0.715 per share dividend payable on Dec 31, 2024. Recognized for corporate citizenship.
news.summary: The Board of Trustees of Eversource Energy (NYSE:ES) has agreed to a quarterly dividend of $0.715 per share, which will be paid out on December 31, 2024. Shareholders as of December 18, 2024, will be eligible for this dividend. Eversource (NYSE: ES) has recently been recognized for its corporate citizenship and ranks as one of the top energy companies in Newsweek's list of America’s Most Responsible Companies for 2024. Additionally, it has been acknowledged as a Five-Year Champion for its consistent performance in this regard.

news.headline: BioCryst granted 17,400 stock options and 12,150 RSUs to 5 new hires on Nov 29, 2024 under Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4).
news.summary: On December 4, 2024, BioCryst Pharmaceuticals, Inc. disclosed that five new employees were awarded stock options for 17,400 shares and restricted stock units (RSUs) for 12,150 shares of the company's common stock by the compensation committee of BioCryst’s board of directors. These incentives, given on November 29, 2024, were vital in recruiting the employees as per Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

news.headline: KNOT Offshore Partners LP reported $76.3M revenues, $17.2M operating income, $3.8M net loss for Q3 2024. $45.1M Adjusted EBITDA. $77.2M liquidity.
news.summary: In the third quarter of 2024, KNOT Offshore Partners LP experienced significant financial performance. The Partnership reported total revenues of $76.3 million, operating income of $17.2 million, and a net loss of $3.8 million. Additionally, they generated an Adjusted EBITDA of $45.1 million. As of September 30, 2024, KNOT Offshore Partners had $77.2 million in available liquidity, with $67.2 million in cash and cash equivalents and undrawn revolving credit to make up the rest.

news.headline: DLH reports Q4 results, debt reduced to under $155M amid technology transformation.
news.summary: The company has successfully reduced its debt to less than $155 million while making progress in its technology transformation efforts. The significant decrease in debt signifies a positive step for the company, aligning with its strategic goal of modernizing its technology. This achievement showcases the company's commitment to financial stability and growth, as well as its dedication to enhancing its technological capabilities. The reduced debt amount highlights the company's prudent financial management and commitment to its transformation journey, setting a solid foundation for future success.

news.headline: Acuity Brands will announce Q1 2025 results on Jan 9, 2025 in Atlanta.
news.summary: Atlanta-based company Acuity Brands is set to release their financial results for the first quarter of fiscal year 2025 on January 9, 2025. The announcement will provide important insights into the company's performance and financial standing, offering valuable information to investors and stakeholders. Stay tuned for more details on this upcoming report from Acuity Brands.

news.headline: Cognyte Intelligence Summit 2024 in Herzliya, Israel highlights AI innovation for tackling threats.
news.summary: A recent event in Herzliya, Israel, known as the Cognyte Intelligence Summit 2024, highlighted groundbreaking AI technologies by the company to address new threats. This event demonstrated the company's commitment to innovation and security.

news.headline: AeroVironment reports second quarter results for fiscal 2025 in Arlington, with increase in revenue and profit.
news.summary: Arlington, Virginia - AeroVironment has recently revealed their financial results for the second quarter of fiscal year 2025. The company reported a revenue of $XX million, showing an increase of XX% compared to the same period last year. The net profit for this quarter stood at $XX million, reflecting a growth of XX% year-over-year. AeroVironment's performance in Q2 FY25 indicates a strong and promising trajectory for the company.

news.headline: UiPath's CFO & COO to chat at Barclays 22nd Global Tech Conference on Dec 11th, 8:40 am PT.
news.summary: UiPath, Inc., a prominent enterprise automation and AI software company trading under NYSE as PATH, shared that Ashim Gupta, their CFO and COO, will engage in a fireside chat at the Barclays 22nd Annual Global Technology Conference. The event will take place at the Palace Hotel in San Francisco, CA, on December 11th at 8:40 am PT (11:40 am ET). Interested parties can access the live audio webcast and archived replay via the Investor Relations section.

news.headline: SentinelOne (NYSE: S) reports strong Q3 results with exceeded growth expectations for fiscal year 2025. CEO Tomer Weingarten notes positive business momentum.
news.summary: SentinelOne, Inc. (NYSE: S), based in Mountain View, California, disclosed their financial performance for the third quarter of fiscal year 2025, which concluded on October 31, 2024. CEO Tomer Weingarten highlighted their robust execution and business momentum, surpassing revenue growth projections and revitalizing new business expansion. The Singularity Platform is gaining traction among enterprises for its instantaneous, self-governing security features, fueled by the company's cutting-edge advancements.

news.headline: Herbalife CFO to join Water Tower Research fireside chat on Dec 10 at 11am ET. Watch webcast at given link.
news.summary: Herbalife Ltd. disclosed that John DeSimone, the Chief Financial Officer, is set to engage in a fireside chat with Doug Lane, the Head of Consumer Products at Water Tower Research on December 10, 2024, at 11:00 a.m. ET (8:00 a.m. PT). Interested individuals can access the webcast through the provided link: https://us06web.zoom.us/webinar/register/1017331626965/WN_NbBssI84Tf2YJfBOelrpxg. This event is a significant opportunity for those keen on insights into the premier health and wellness company, with Herbalife Ltd. being identified on the NYSE as HLF.

news.headline: Helport AI (NASDAQ: HPAI) to present at iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Winter Conference on Dec. 10-11, 2024. CFO to participate.
news.summary: Helport AI Limited (NASDAQ: HPAI), an AI technology company based in Singapore and San Diego, disclosed that Tao Ke, their Chief Financial Officer, is scheduled to participate in the iAccess Alpha Virtual Best Ideas Winter Conference 2024 on December 10 and 11, 2024. The company offers intelligent software, services, and solutions to enterprise clients.

news.headline: DTE Energy's 2025 Annual Meeting scheduled for May 8, 2024, in Detroit (NYSE: DTE).
news.summary: In Detroit on December 4, 2024, the Board of Directors of DTE Energy (NYSE: DTE) revealed that the upcoming 2025 Annual Meeting for Common Stock Shareholders is scheduled for Thursday, May 8.

news.headline: ChargePoint (CHPT) reports Q3 FY2025 financial results with record EV sales driving need for more charging infrastructure. CEO Rick Wilmer pleased with results.
news.summary: In Campbell, California, ChargePoint Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:CHPT), a prominent provider of EV charging solutions, announced its Q3 FY2025 results ending on October 31, 2024. CEO Rick Wilmer expressed optimism due to record EV sales and increasing demand for charging infrastructure. The company surpassed expectations in the third quarter, reflecting the growing trend of network utilization.

news.headline: StoneX Financial Limited partners with Plantureux & Associés SAS for commercial clearing services in agriculture sector.
news.summary: StoneX Financial Limited has formed a commercial clearing partnership with Plantureux & Ass, a Paris-based agricultural commodity broker. The partnership will allow both entities to benefit from each other's expertise and services to enhance their offerings in the market. This collaboration aims to facilitate efficient and effective trading in the agricultural commodity sector. The agreement is set to leverage the strengths of StoneX Financial and Plantureux & Ass to better serve their clients and expand their market reach. This strategic partnership is anticipated to result in improved services for customers and increased market opportunities for both companies.

news.headline: Canadian General Investments: NAV as of Nov 30, 2024 was $71.96, with YTD and 12-month returns of 31.4% and 36.9% respectively, outperforming the S&P/TSX Composite Index.
news.summary: In Toronto, Canada, as of December 04, 2024, Canadian General Investments, Limited (CGI) disclosed that its unaudited net asset value per share (NAV) on November 30, 2024, stood at $71.96. The year-to-date and 12-month NAV returns, with dividends reinvested, were noted at 31.4% and 36.9%, respectively. In comparison, the S&P/TSX Composite Index yielded returns of 25.8% and 30.7% on a total return basis for the corresponding periods. The company's stock is listed on both the Toronto Stock Exchange (TSX: CGI) and the London Stock Exchange (LSE: CGI).

news.headline: Illumina executives to speak at 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on Jan 14, 2024 at 9:00am PT (12:00pm ET).
news.summary: Illumina, Inc. made an announcement that its executives are slated to present at the 43rd Annual J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference on January 14, 2024. The presentation will take place at 9:00am Pacific Time (12:00pm Eastern Time). The company is listed on NASDAQ as ILMN.

news.headline: Global Medical REIT Inc. declares 2024 Q4 dividends for common and preferred shares. (NYSE: GMRE) #dividends #GMRE
news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland, Global Medical REIT Inc. (NYSE: GMRE), a net-lease medical real estate investment trust, recently declared its common and preferred dividends for the fourth quarter of 2024. The company acquires healthcare facilities and leases them to physician groups, regional, and national healthcare systems. The Board of Directors announced the dividend declaration for this period. The common dividend for the fourth quarter of 2024 has been confirmed.

news.headline: Coinbase CFO to speak at 51st Nasdaq London Investor Conference on Dec 11, 2024 at 1:30pm GMT / 8:30am ET. Live webcast on Coinbase's IR website.
news.summary: Alesia Haas, the Chief Financial Officer of Coinbase Global, Inc., is scheduled to join a fireside chat at the 51st Nasdaq London Investor Conference on December 11, 2024, at 1:30pm GMT / 8:30 am ET. The event will be broadcast live and a replay will be accessible on Coinbase’s Investor Relations website at https://investor.coinbase.com. Additionally, information disclosed in compliance with the Securities and Exchange Commission will also be made available.

news.headline: Myomo, Inc. plans public offering of common stock (ticker symbol: MYO) on NYSE American, with option to sell 15% more shares.
news.summary: A medical robotics company, Myomo, Inc. (NYSE American: MYO), based in Boston, has disclosed its plan to conduct an underwritten public offering. The company specializes in wearable technology aimed at enhancing the capabilities of individuals with neurological disorders and upper limb paralysis. As part of this offering, Myomo will be selling shares of its common stock, with an additional option for the underwriter to purchase up to 15% more shares within a 30-day period. This strategic move signifies the company's intent to raise capital and potentially expand its operations.

news.headline: Royal Gold will participate in Renmark Financial Communications VND Roadshow on Dec 18, 2024.
news.summary: Royal Gold will be taking part in the Renmark Financial Communications Virtual Non-Deal Roadshow Series on December 18, 2024. This event will provide an opportunity for the company to engage with investors and stakeholders. Royal Gold's participation highlights its commitment to transparent communication and investor relations. The roadshow will be held virtually, allowing for broad participation and efficient communication. This event is a key component of Royal Gold's investor outreach strategy and will help showcase the company's performance and potential to a wider audience.
